From diving to parachuting the West Australian Institute of Sport provides elite athletes in WA with the support and facilities to achieve their goals.

WAIS CEO Matt Fulton shared with Millsy & Karl on6PR Breakfastthe “world-class” facility is more than just a training ground.

“How we win is just as important… it’s all about inspiring our community,” said Mr Fulton.

Press PLAY below to hear how WA athletes prepare for the Olympics

title: Inside the training ground of Olympic Athletes
